params.name: name
params.description: First name (or full name with split=true) to look up. Supports semicolon-separated lists when multi=true.

params.name: email
params.description: Email address from which to extract the name.

params.name: country
params.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to localize the lookup.

params.name: ip
params.description: Client IP address used to localize the lookup.

params.name: locale
params.description: Browser locale (e.g. en_US, de_DE) used to localize the lookup.

params.name: split
params.description: When true, splits a full name and resolves the first name automatically.

params.name: multi
params.description: When true, accepts a semicolon-separated list of names (max 100 per request).

params.name: key
params.description: Gender-API key (alternatively send via apiKey query or Authorization header per account configuration).

items.docs: Returns a gender prediction (male, female, or unknown) for the supplied first name with an accuracy score. Supports localization by country, IP, or locale, and parsing of full names or email addresses.

info.name: Get likely country of origin for a name

items.docs: Returns the most likely country (or list of countries) of origin for the supplied first or last name. Costs more credits per query than /get.
Returns account information including remaining credits, plan details, and usage statistics for the supplied API key.
